creator: marino@FreeBSD.org
text:
I'm starting to suspect there is nothing wrong with VMSupportCS8; it's only the first symbol that fails.

That leads to the symbol lookup mechanism being the problem, which I think is located here: hotspot/src/share/vm/prims/nativeLookup.cpp

Since it is string based, it might be affected by locale.
Evidence against this theory is the symbol Java_java_util_concurrent_atomic_AtomicLong_VMSupportsCS8 is the same in ascii and UTF-8.
